---
title: "W5 - SDTM Mapping Concepts"
author: "Louis Chou"
date: "2026-07-11"
format: html
---

## Setup

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
```

## Raw Data

```{r}
# Simulated raw demographic data
raw_demo <- data.frame(
  STUDYID  = rep("CDISCPILOT01", 5),
  SUBJID   = c("1001", "1002", "1003", "1004", "1005"),
  BRTHDT   = c("1950-03-12", "1945-07-22", "1960-01-30",
               "1938-11-05", "1955-09-18"),
  SEX_RAW  = c("Male", "Female", "Male", "Female", "Male"),
  RACE_RAW = c("White", "Black", "Asian", "White", "Other"),
  SITEID   = c("701", "701", "702", "702", "703")
)

raw_demo
```

## Mini-DM Mapping

```{r}
# SDTM mapping logic: condition -> assign
# 1. USUBJID = STUDYID-SITEID-SUBJID
# 2. SEX: CT mapping (Male -> M, Female -> F, other -> U)
# 3. BRTHDTC: validate ISO 8601 format, flag INVALID if not
# 4. Assemble mini-DM with required variables only
final1 <- raw_demo %>%
  mutate(
    USUBJID = str_c(STUDYID, SITEID, SUBJID, sep = "-"),
    DOMAIN  = "DM",
    SEX = case_when(
      SEX_RAW == "Male"   ~ "M",
      SEX_RAW == "Female" ~ "F",
      TRUE                ~ "U"
    ),
    BRTHDTC = case_when(
      str_detect(BRTHDT, "\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}") ~ BRTHDT,
      TRUE                                        ~ "INVALID"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(USUBJID) %>%
  select(STUDYID, DOMAIN, USUBJID, SUBJID, SEX, BRTHDTC)

final1
```
